summary: The diff implements a global CSS override to force essentially all text elements to render white site-wide, without any explicit background/media changes. However, it also includes unrelated metadata/documentation updates (frontend-file-summaries.txt and project_state.json) that were not requested in the BuildRequest.

hallucinated_features.description: Updated project tracking/metadata files (project_state.json) to add/mark new feature requests unrelated to implementing the white-text styling itself.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest only asks for frontend styling changes to make text white and explicitly states no other work is needed; updating project state/feature request tracking is not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Updated/generated a frontend component summary file describing many UI/content/background features (including new routes/pages and background enhancements) that are outside the scope of making text white.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest is strictly a text color styling change with non-goals including no new pages/routes/content and no changes beyond text color; modifying a summary file to describe additional features is not requested and suggests scope creep (even if only documentation).
